notes: Transcribed from the official Newport Folk 2026 schedule at newportfolk.org/schedule (Fort, Quad, Harbor, Foundation, and Bike stages, July 24-26). official.2 reflects a Sunday Fort Stage update: Tedeschi Trucks Band withdrew and Father John Misty was added, with Brandi Carlile and Nathaniel Rateliff & Friends set times shifted accordingly. Artists and times are subject to change; confirm critical details with Newport Folk.
